notes: i love this project because it combines my passion for education with technology. I believe that by creating a platform that provides parents with insights into their children's learning, we can foster a more supportive and engaged learning environment. I'm excited to work on this project and contribute to its success.

project.background: Parents are increasingly involved in their children's learning journeys, but current edtech platforms often lack transparent progress reports or actionable feedback. BrightBloom wants to close this gap with a parent-focused insight dashboard.
project.name: BrightBloom Parent Insight Dashboard
project.outcomes: An interactive dashboard with live data fetching, customizable views per student, and downloadable PDF reports — tailored for parent usability and integrated with BrightBloom’s learning system.
project.req_skills:
JavaScript/TypeScript

Data visualization tools (Chart.js, D3, or Recharts)

Backend experience with Node.js or Firebase

UX/UI design basics
project.scope: This project involves designing and developing a web-based dashboard where parents can log in to view metrics like weekly learning time, topic mastery, quiz performance, and emotional engagement (measured via in-app sentiment analysis). The challenge is turning raw student data into intuitive, meaningful visualizations.
